_comment: OID registry for VSAC-hosted certified value sets. We commit OIDs + version pins ONLY (license-safe); fetch_vsac.py hydrates the codes with the customer's UMLS API key. Verify each OID/version at https://vsac.nlm.nih.gov before relying on it — value sets are updated annually and some concepts (e.g. diabetes ICD-10-CM) have overlapping value sets.

value_sets.name: Diabetes (diagnosis)
value_sets.use: diabetes cohort; eCQM-aligned. Maps to filters/diagnosis.tql value_set("diabetes").

value_sets.name: HbA1c Laboratory Test
value_sets.use: HbA1c test numerator for the HEDIS-style measure (hedis_measure.tql).
